stem: A pupil is writing OCR Exam Reference Language pseudocode that prints the integers 1 to 5 inclusive on separate lines. Two parts of the loop are missing.
model_answer: A `for` loop with `1 TO 5` runs the body once for `i = 1, 2, 3, 4, 5`. The body prints the loop counter. `next i` closes the loop block.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Fill in the gaps so the program prints 1 to 5 inclusive on separate lines.

mark_points.text: Print the loop counter `i` inside the body.
